assertions.title: Visual output is identical

steps.action: Verify GridIcon SVG structure in Icons.jsx
steps.observed: viewBox='0 0 24 24' confirmed; 4 rect elements present (x3y3w7h7, x14y3w7h7, x14y14w7h7, x3y14w7h7)

steps.action: Verify VideoIcon SVG structure in Icons.jsx
steps.observed: viewBox='0 0 24 24' confirmed; 1 rect (x2y4w20h16 rx4ry4) and 1 polygon (points='10 8 16 12 10 16') present

steps.action: Verify LabIcon SVG structure in Icons.jsx
steps.observed: viewBox='0 0 24 24' confirmed; 1 circle (cx12cy12r1) and 3 ellipses (rotate(-45), rotate(45), no-rotate) present

steps.action: Verify FlashcardsIcon SVG structure in Icons.jsx
steps.observed: viewBox='0 0 24 24' confirmed; 3 rect elements present (x2y4w12h16, x6y3w12h16, x10y4w12h16)

steps.action: Verify CircularProgress SVG structure in Icons.jsx
steps.expected: viewBox='0 0 36 36' with path and text elements
steps.observed: viewBox='0 0 36 36' confirmed; 2 path elements (circle-bg, circle with strokeDasharray) and 1 text element present

steps.action: Check for duplicate SVG markup: rect x='3' y='3' width='7' height='7' pattern
steps.expected: Only in Icons.jsx, not in DashboardSections.js, GoalCard.js, or ModuleList.js
steps.observed: Found in Icons.jsx (line 13) AND App.js (line 330). Not found in DashboardSections.js, GoalCard.js, or ModuleList.js.

steps.action: Check for duplicate SVG markup: polygon points='10 8 16 12 10 16' pattern (VideoIcon)
steps.expected: Only in Icons.jsx, not in DashboardSections.js, GoalCard.js, or ModuleList.js
steps.observed: Found in Icons.jsx (line 32) AND ModuleList.js (line 178). DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js are clean.

steps.action: Check for duplicate SVG markup: ellipse cx='12' cy='12' rx='10' ry='4' pattern (LabIcon)
steps.expected: Only in Icons.jsx, not in DashboardSections.js, GoalCard.js, or ModuleList.js
steps.observed: Found in Icons.jsx (lines 48-50) AND ModuleList.js (lines 198-200). DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js are clean.

evidence.iconsStructure: Icons.jsx verified: GridIcon(4 rects), VideoIcon(1 rect+1 polygon), LabIcon(1 circle+3 ellipses), FlashcardsIcon(3 rects), CircularProgress(2 paths+1 text) — all correct viewBox values
evidence.consoleErrors: none (npm test clean, only expected console.error from utility tests)

assertions.issues: Duplicate SVG icon markup found in ModuleList.js (VideoIcon, LabIcon patterns at lines 170-225) and App.js (GridIcon pattern at lines 323-333). VAL-ICON-006 verification step 3 requires these distinctive patterns to appear ONLY in Icons.jsx. ModuleList.js still contains inline SVGs for VideoIcon (polygon), LabIcon (3 ellipses), and FlashcardsIcon (3 rects). App.js still contains inline GridIcon SVG in the navigation menu.

summary: VAL-ICON-006 FAILED: Icon component SVG structures in Icons.jsx are correct and npm test passes (426/426), but duplicate SVG markup exists in ModuleList.js (VideoIcon, LabIcon, FlashcardsIcon patterns) and App.js (GridIcon pattern). Verification step 3 of VAL-ICON-006 requires distinctive SVG patterns to appear only in Icons.jsx, not in the consuming component files.
